case_title: LARRY LIVINGSTON VS. GAETANI REAL ESTATE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LARRY LIVINGSTON IS PRSENT. DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN SISCO, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY LIVINGSTON, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON, LARRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
